title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node, Deno, and browsers; zero native dependencies.

title: langchain-community/llms/ollama
summary: LangChain integration: use any Ollama model as a drop-in LLM for chains, agents, and RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI): folders, sharing, multimodal, RAG, admin panel.

title: chainlit+Ollama cookbook
summary: Cookbook showing how to build a chat UI with Chainlit and Ollama in <30 lines.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI that wraps Ollama with fuzzy finding, chat history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain to chat with local PDFs.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation to install Ollama and any model declaratively on NixOS or via flakes.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri desktop app for macOS/Windows/Linux to chat with Ollama models.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# client targeting .NET 8 with async enumerable streaming and DI-friendly setup.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to Ollama’s REST API.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go SDK generated from OpenAPI spec; chat, embed, and manage models natively.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration: use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-sdks
summary: Meta-repository tracking community SDKs for Ruby, PHP, Dart, Swift, and more.

title: r/ollama - Local LLMs ecosystem discussion
summary: Active subreddit for sharing models, tools, benchmarks, and troubleshooting Ollama setups.
